title: eragrostis grandis
intro: Eragrostis grandis, also known as Giant Love Grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis grandis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be consumed as a tea or taken as a tincture to reap its medicinal benefits.
